overview: A document scanner and PDF maker web app that captures documents via camera or image upload, applies perspective correction, and generates downloadable PDFs — all processed locally in the browser for privacy.
features: Camera capture with live preview and edge detection
Upload images (JPG, PNG) as document pages
Page management: add, remove, reorder pages
Instant PDF download with timestamp filename
Fully client-side processing — no files uploaded to server
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
